original_image_tags: A faded red stamp over the distribution list reads "RECORDED EX-89". Below that, a large red stamp reads "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION U. S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE".

elements.description: A purple rectangular stamp in the bottom left corner. Text inside reads: 'COMMUNICATIONS SECTION', 'MAILED 12', 'OCT 4 1947 P.M.'. Below the stamp is a typed list of names (Mr. Tolson, Mr. E. A. Tamm, etc.). Faint stamped text 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION' and 'U. S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE' is visible over the bottom of the list.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on the color (red vs. purple), content, and verbatim text of the stamps, which are the primary visual elements described.
